options.command: bunx --bun tsup --config tsup.config.ts && bunx --bun tsc --project tsconfig.dts.json --pretty false && mkdir -p dist/migrations && cp migrations/*.sql dist/migrations/
node -e "const Database=require('better-sqlite3'); const db=new Database(':memory:'); console.log(db.prepare('SELECT 1 AS value').get().value); db.close();"

rm -rf .tmp-tests && bunx --bun tsc --project tsconfig.test.json --pretty false && mkdir -p .tmp-tests/boundaries/kernel/implementations/typescript/backend-sqlite/migrations && cp migrations/*.sql .tmp-tests/boundaries/kernel/implementations/typescript/backend-sqlite/migrations/ && node --test .tmp-tests/boundaries/kernel/implementations/typescript/backend-sqlite/test/backend-sqlite.test.js
bunx --bun tsc --project tsconfig.lib.json --noEmit --pretty false && bunx --bun tsc --project tsconfig.typecheck.json --noEmit --pretty false
